---
title: "Resources"
---

# Resources

This page contains freely available teaching materials.

## Books

- 📘 **Fundamentos de Técnicas Cuantitativas** ([PDF](files/Libro-FTC-SegundaEdicion.pdf))

## Lecture Notes

- 📄 Lecture Notes on ...
- 📄 Lecture Notes on ...

These materials are freely available for educational purposes. Please cite the original source if you use them.
